OmniScript.description: Shows the applicant education data that is already stored in Salesforce, and collects new education data from the applicant.
OmniScript.name: CollegeSection

omniProcessElements.name: CANCEL
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Cancel", "validationRequired" : "Submit", "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "pubsub" : false, "message" : { }, "targetType" : "Record", "objectAction" : "home", "recordAction" : "view", "loginAction" : "login", "targetFilter" : "Recent", "targetId" : "%CollegeApplicant:PreliminaryApplicationRefId%", "variant" : "brand", "iconName" : "", "iconVariant" : "", "iconPosition" : "left", "replace" : true, "targetLWCLayout" : "lightning", "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "showCancelPrompt" : true, "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure you want to cancel? Any unsaved changes will be lost.", "targetName" : "PreliminaryApplicationRef" }

childElements.name: CollegeIncomplete
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "I need to add or update information in this section", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : "Yes", "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : null, "value" : "Yes", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : null, "value" : "No", "autoAdv" : null } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: KnownCollegeEducationCard
KnownCollegeEducationInstructions
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "sanitize" : false, "textKey" : "", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "dataJSON" : false, "show" : null, "text" : "

Select information to include in your application. You can add, edit, or delete details.

", "label" : "Known College Instructions", "controlWidth" : 12 }

childElements.name: NewCollegesBlockHeader
CollegeCalculatedClassRank
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Calculated Class Rank", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "IF((%CollegeClassRankReportingFormat|n%=\"Exact\"), %CollegeClassRank|n%, IF((%CollegeClassRankReportingFormat|n%=\"Decile\"), %CollegeDecileRank|n%, IF((%CollegeClassRankReportingFormat|n%=\"Quintile\"), %CollegeQuintileRank|n%, IF((%CollegeClassRankReportingFormat|n%=\"Quartile\"), %CollegeQuartileRank|n%, NULL))))", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : null, "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: CollegeClassRank
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Class Rank", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "Exact", "condition" : "=", "field" : "CollegeClassRankReportingFormat|n" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: CollegeClassRankReportingFormat
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Class Rank Reporting Format", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Exact", "developerName" : null, "value" : "Exact", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "Decile", "developerName" : null, "value" : "Decile", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "Quartile", "developerName" : null, "value" : "Quartile", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "Quintile", "developerName" : null, "value" : "Quintile", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "None", "developerName" : null, "value" : "None", "autoAdv" : null } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: CollegeCumulativeGPA
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Cumulative GPA", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "placeholder" : "", "mask" : null, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: CollegeDecileRank
CollegeEndDate
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "maxDate" : "", "minDate" : "", "disOnTplt" : false, "hide" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "No", "condition" : "=", "field" : "CollegeWillGraduate|n" } ] } }, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "modelDateFormat" : "yyyy-MM-dd", "dateType" : "string", "helpTextPos" : "", "helpText" : "", "help" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "readOnly" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "repeatClone" : false, "repeat" : false, "required" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "showInputWidth" : false, "label" : "End Date", "controlWidth" : 12 }

childElements.name: CollegeGPAScale
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "GPA Scale", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "placeholder" : "4-100 range", "mask" : null, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: CollegeGPAWeighting
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "GPA Weighting Type", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Weighted", "developerName" : null, "value" : "Weighted", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "Unweighted", "developerName" : null, "value" : "Unweighted", "autoAdv" : null } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: CollegeGraduatingClassSize
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Graduation Class Size", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: CollegeGraduationDate
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Graduation Date", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "dateType" : "string", "modelDateFormat" : "yyyy-MM-dd", "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "Yes", "condition" : "=", "field" : "CollegeWillGraduate|n" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "minDate" : "", "maxDate" : "" }

childElements.name: CollegeWillGraduate
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Did you, or will you, graduate from this school?", "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes", "developerName" : null, "value" : "Yes", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "No", "developerName" : null, "value" : "No", "autoAdv" : null } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100, "optionHeight" : 100, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

AccountId
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Selected Account", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "mask" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "minLength" : 0, "maxLength" : 255, "placeholder" : "", "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : true, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }

childElements.name: EDUAdmissionsGetSchoolsDR
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Fetch Schools", "bundle" : "EDUAdmissionsGetSchools", "ignoreCache" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "element" : "EDUAdmissionsGetSchools|n", "inputParam" : "LookupKey" }, { "element" : "SchoolType", "inputParam" : "SchoolType" } ], "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

childElements.name: EDUAdmissionsGetSchools
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Institution Name", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "googleTransformation" : { "street" : "", "locality" : "", "administrative_area_level_1" : "", "administrative_area_level_2" : "", "country" : "", "postal_code" : "" }, "required" : true, "readOnly" : false, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "minLength" : 2, "maxLength" : 255, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "typeAheadKey" : "CompoundLabel", "dataProcessorFunction" : "", "callFrequency" : 300, "editMode" : false, "newItemLabel" : "", "hideEditButton" : true, "enableGoogleMapsAutocomplete" : false, "enableLookup" : false, "disableDataFilter" : false, "googleMapsAPIKey" : "", "hideMap" : true, "googleAddressCountry" : "all", "useDataJson" : false, "dataJsonPath" : "", "HTMLTemplateId" : "" }

childElements.name: LineBreak1

childElements.propertySetConfig:

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }

childElements.name: NewCollegesForm

omniProcessElements.name: CollegeEducation
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "Prior College or University", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "Save", "nextWidth" : 3, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: GetCollegeApplicantData
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Get Applicant Data", "bundle" : "EDUAdmissionsGetApplicantFromIndividualApplnTask", "ignoreCache" : true, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "element" : "ContextId", "inputParam" : "IndividualApplicationTaskId" } ], "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "CollegeApplicant", "inProgressMessage" : "In Progress", "postMessage" : "Done", "failureNextLabel" : "Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "Go Back", "failureAbortMessage" : "Are you sure?", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: SetCollegeFlexcardAttributes
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Set College Flexcard Attributes", "elementValueMap" : { "CollegeFlexcardAttributes" : "{\"ContactId\": \"%CollegeApplicant:ApplicantId%\", \"EducationLevel\": \"Degree\", \"IATId\": \"%ContextId%\", \"IndividualApplicationId\": \"%CollegeApplicant:ApplicationId%\", \"IsReadOnly\": \"false\", \"Source\": \"College\"}", "SchoolType" : "College" }, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false }
